rationale: Both evaluations award an identical 6/10 and rest on the same substantive reasoning: a strong Staff-level AI/MCP and high-throughput systems profile offset by the missing must-have Python skill and thin evidence of staff-scope architecture leadership and on-call ownership. The wording differs but the strengths, concerns, and recommended interview probes map one-to-one. No concern, score shift, or reasoning change keys off the Berlin→Bangalore location swap, which carries no job-relevant signal.
